hero.tagline: Building fast, scalable and intelligent web experiences with modern technologies.
about.heading: Background & Experience
about.description: A blend of engineering, design, and AI to build products that solve real problems.
about.philosophy_p1: I believe that the best software is not just functional, but an absolute joy to use. By combining cutting-edge AI capabilities with meticulous frontend architecture, I strive to create web experiences that feel native, fast, and intelligent.
about.description_main: Full Stack Developer specialising in modern web applications, clean architecture, and AI-powered solutions.
skills.heading: Technical Arsenal
skills.description: A comprehensive list of the tools, frameworks, and technologies I use to build scalable web applications and AI solutions.
projects.heading: Featured Projects
projects.description: A selection of my recent work, focusing on AI integrations, robust backend architecture, and premium frontend experiences.
contact.heading: Let's build something amazing together.
contact.description: Currently available for freelance work and open to new opportunities. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!
exp.iqadam.description: Developed responsive web applications and collaborated with the team to deliver high-quality user interfaces.

exp.iqadam.hl2: Created reusable UI components and integrated REST APIs
exp.iqadam.hl3: Optimized application performance and collaborated using Git
